description: Stale TDD phase comment in class XML doc: 'TDD Red Phase: Team class does not exist yet — these tests define the expected API.' The Team class is now fully implemented in Team.cs. This comment is misleading dead documentation that no longer reflects reality.
suggestedFix: Remove or update the comment to reflect that the Team class is implemented. Replace with: 'Tests for the Team model class, verifying all properties, defaults, and mutability.'
